Changes from v5:

 - suse15/ext4-inode-version.patch moved to uek5 due to suse15 ldiskfs patch series has migrated to mainline (yet).
 - rebased on remove old map blocks support
 - dropped ldiskfs series for 4.14.35-1902.uek
 - Added -Werror for ext4_bread signature test

parents.subject: LU-12355 ldiskfs: Remove old map blocks support

commit.subject: LU-12405 ldiskfs: Add support for Oracle uek 5 release 2
commit.message:
LU-12405 ldiskfs: Add support for Oracle uek 5 release 2

Enable building lustre against the Oracle Linux UEK kernels

Initial support for uek 5 release 2 starting with 4.14.35-1902.2.0
Only test for ext4_bread prototype matches ext4.h for ext4_bread.

Add detection for uek kernel signature and suppress warnings
about expecting an Ubuntu, RHEL or SLES kernel.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Cray-bug-id: LUS-7440
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <stancheff@cray.com>
Change-Id: I6c4142c4244a99a3ec814a4145852bbba8f814a8
